Now Hiring – Amalapuram, Konaseema AP

Medical Representative Jobs in Amalapuram, Konaseema

Amalapuram in Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Konaseema district is one of Andhra Pradesh's most underserved pharma markets — and one of the most rewarding for a Medical Representative who understands how to build lasting doctor relationships. Fewer competitors means more accessible doctors, faster prescription conversion, and stronger career territory ownership. Crasenim Pharma is hiring MRs and commission-based sales professionals in Amalapuram for our WHO GMP certified product range.

📍 Amalapuram, Konaseema 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🌾 Underserved Delta Market ✅ WHO GMP Certified Brand
💬 Apply via WhatsApp View All Openings
Territory Overview

Your Territory as an MR in Amalapuram, Konaseema

The Konaseema delta offers a genuinely different MR experience — less competition, more accessible doctors, and a loyal prescription base that rewards consistent professional effort.

As an MR based in Amalapuram, you cover the Konaseema delta — a compact district with a cluster of mandal towns connected by road through the Godavari delta backwaters. Your primary territory includes Amalapuram town and nearby centres such as Razole, Mummidivaram, Ambajipeta and P. Gannavaram. The territory is navigable by motorbike or car as a regular daily field circuit.

What makes this territory valuable is the nature of the Konaseema medical community. Doctors here tend to be long-term practitioners in the district, which means that once you establish a prescription, it typically continues reliably over time. You are not fighting new competitors every quarter — you are building a compounding prescription base that makes your performance figures grow year on year.

Amalapuram MR Territory Coverage

Amalapuram Town, Razole, Mummidivaram, Ambajipeta, P. Gannavaram, Allavaram, Malikipuram — manageable Konaseema delta field circuit

The Konaseema MR Advantage: Loyalty Compounds

In big cities, doctors switch prescriptions frequently as competing MRs offer similar products. In Konaseema, a doctor who prescribes Crasenim Pharma because an MR built a genuine relationship tends to continue for years. That loyalty is your career asset — it means your performance track record in Amalapuram translates into strong numbers that support your next promotion.

  • Fewer competing MRs — easier access to every doctor in the district
  • Loyal medical community — long prescription retention once established
  • Compact, navigable field circuit covering multiple mandal towns
  • Growing private clinic and pharmacy base as Konaseema develops
  • Consistent GP and general medicine prescription demand year-round
Current Openings

Pharma Job Vacancies in Amalapuram, Konaseema

MR and commission-based roles for pharma professionals with local Amalapuram and Konaseema connections.

Medical Representative – Amalapuram & Konaseema Delta
📍 Amalapuram, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Konaseema 💼 Full-Time Permanent 🕒 1–3 Years Pharma Experience
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma's WHO GMP certified medicines to GPs, clinics and pharmacies across Amalapuram and Konaseema mandal towns
  • Build durable doctor relationships in a loyal medical community — prescriptions you establish here last longer than in competitive urban markets
  • Cover Amalapuram town plus key mandal centres including Razole, Mummidivaram, Ambajipeta and P. Gannavaram
  • Competitive base salary + monthly performance incentives + travel allowance
Commission-Based MR – Amalapuram
📍 Amalapuram / Konaseema 💼 Commission / Flexible 🕒 Any Experience Welcome
Now Hiring
  • Earn commission on every prescription of Crasenim Pharma products generated in Amalapuram and surrounding Konaseema mandals
  • No investment required — flexible arrangement that can be combined with existing employment
  • Monthly bonuses for consistent prescription generation in the Konaseema territory
  • Ideal for candidates with an existing Amalapuram or Konaseema doctor network
Why Crasenim Pharma

Why Build Your MR Career in Konaseema with Crasenim Pharma?

Quality Brand

WHO GMP Certified Products

Manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS under WHO GMP standards. A quality-certified product range is easier to introduce and easier to retain in a loyal market like Konaseema.

Accessible Market

Fewer Competitors, More Access

In Amalapuram, you are one of very few professional MRs representing a certified brand. Doctor access is straightforward, visit quality is higher, and your first impression matters more — and lasts longer.

Career Growth

Build a Territory That Compounds

The loyalty of the Konaseema medical community means prescriptions you build here continue for years. Your performance numbers grow over time without the constant rebuilding required in high-churn urban markets.

Full Support

Training & Detailing Materials

Regular product training, visual aids, product cards, and sample allocation. You receive the same full detailing support as our MRs in major cities — plus regular management field visits.

FAQs

MR Jobs in Amalapuram – FAQ

Is there a real career opportunity for an MR in Amalapuram, or is it too small a market?
Amalapuram is a district headquarters with a real and growing healthcare market. The advantage for an MR here is not market size alone, but market quality — the Konaseema medical community is loyal, accessible, and underserved by quality pharma brands. An MR who builds strong relationships here generates compounding prescription value that creates a strong career track record.
What products would I promote as an MR in Amalapuram?
You would detail Crasenim Pharma's full range including Amoxsenim-CV 625 (antibiotic), Pansenim-DSR (gastric), Telsenim-40 (cardiac), Metsenim-G (diabetic), Crasenim Bar (pediatric skin) and Crasenim-LC (wellness). All products are WHO GMP certified and manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS.
Which mandal towns would I cover as an MR from Amalapuram?
Depending on your territory assignment, you would typically cover Amalapuram town plus Razole, Mummidivaram, Ambajipeta, P. Gannavaram and Allavaram as your core Konaseema delta circuit. Territory is agreed during onboarding based on your field capacity.
How do I apply for an MR job in Amalapuram?
WhatsApp your name, experience and Amalapuram as your preferred location to +91 99890 74806, or apply through our Careers page. Our HR team responds within 2 working days.
